word: G1710 - ἐμπορεύομαι - emporeúomai - em-por-yoo'-om-ahee - Buy and sell

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Buy and sell
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to go a trading, to travel for business, to traffic, trade
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1722 and G4198; to travel in (a country as a pedlar), that is, (by implication) to trade: - buy and sell, make merchandise.
